## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Docs

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated and `make test` passes (backend) / `pnpm build` succeeds (frontend/docs)
- [ ] `make lint` is clean
- [ ] Docs updated (README, `docs/`, env tables) if behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets, `.env` files, or generated artifacts committed
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits and are signed off (`git commit -s`)
